title: Belenus Champion Hospitals: Best Hospital at Sarjapur Road, Bangalore
heading: Belenus Champion Hospital : Where Excellence Meets Compassion
description: Welcome to our official website of At Belenus Champion Hospital, Sarjapur Road, Bangalore.Belenus Champion Hospital is a super-specialty hospital in Bangalore, India, located on Sarjapur - Marathahalli Road. It is a multi-specialty facility offering services including neurology, cardiology, gastroenterology, and robotic knee replacement. The hospital features over 170 beds and provides 24/7 emergency care. Location: Opposite Decathlon, Chikkabellandur, Carmelaram, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560035.

From diagnostics to rehabilitation, we're here to guide you every step of the way towards wellness. Central to our ethos is the principle of personalized attention, where every patient is treated as a unique individual deserving of utmost respect and care. Leveraging cutting-edge technology and embracing innovative research, we ensure that our patients receive nothing short of the highest quality care available. Your health is our priority, and we're committed to providing the highest quality care with compassion. Make an Appointment Belenus Champion Hospital 4.5 Based on 2715 reviews powered by G o o g l e review us on Anjali Reang Reang a year ago Hospital is very good with well treated staff and doctors are also well treating Buddha Dev a year ago One of the best hospital in Bangalore with the best services And they have the best packages for health checkup. Now they have started new cardiology packages which is very beneficial for the patients with cheap and best pakages Hari Kandel a year ago Hospital has very good services with pocket friendly budget All the staff are also very good and humble Manju Devi a year ago Very good service . I am very much satisfied with their work SoG WINGS a year ago Siva Guru a year ago Service is too good. Doctors & management is very polite & clear.. seeing the doctor takes more time even though there are many management people available.. Many offers are available from end to end on payment. That is good. Hope, will continue for years. srisiva a year ago Dr. Vikram’s surgical expertise and compassionate care have truly amazing. I am immensely grateful to his team for skillful hands and unwavering support throughout my journey to recovery . Nursing staff has taken very good care.. Floor manager also was very helpful. Thanks to housekeeping team also. Billing team also so co operative.. Thank you all MANIKANTA RAMANJINEYULU a year ago The treating of patient is very good and clean.The following respective coordinators are also very flexible to mingle with us .The doctor Karthika madam is very good and awesome person I never seen .Over all the hospitality is very good in this hospital . It provides great emergency services. I had to visit this when one of my relatives met with an accident and it was the nearest hospital. They handled the situation really well and helped us in all possible ways to get good treatment at that time. Gaurav Singh Happy Patient We had an excellent experience during our recent visit to Belenus Hospital for the preventative health package. From start to finish, the entire process was seamless and efficient. Abhinav Bansal Happy Patient Overall treatment is good. The services were good and the staff and doctors were excellent in all ways. I admitted as Dengue positive on Monday, starting from emergency ward to allotted room I was taken care very good, in 3days I'm alright and discharging today. Thank you all!
